posts.linkedin:
Everyone is talking about making money with AI.

Most of them are selling courses about talking about making money with AI.

The actual process — picking a real audience, building a real offer, using AI to deliver it at scale — is rarely explained without a $497 program attached.

So let me tell you what $1,000/month with AI actually looks like:

It's not a viral ChatGPT prompt you sell on Gumroad.
It's not reselling AI-generated stock photos.
It's not dropshipping AI art.

It's a service or product built for a specific person, delivered using AI tools to make it faster and more scalable than a human doing it manually — priced correctly, sold consistently.

The A.I.M.™ Framework in this guide walks you through exactly how to build that. Audience → Income Offer → Machine.

$27. 21 pages. Real scripts, real case studies, real path to $1K.

posts._note: Show 1 key model or system inside the guide. Build authority. Teach something real.
posts.linkedin:
The A.I.M.™ Framework — the 3-step system for building a $1K/month AI side hustle:

→ A — Audience: Before touching any AI tool, you identify one specific group of people with a painful, recurring problem and the willingness to pay to solve it. The guide includes an Audience Selection Matrix to score your options.

→ I — Income Offer: Using the O.P.S. Offer Formula (Outcome + Process + Scale), you build a productized AI service or digital product with a clear deliverable, a set price, and a delivery process that AI handles at least 50% of. The guide shows you 7 validated AI income models across services and products.

→ M — Machine: The AI stack — the specific combination of tools (ChatGPT, Claude, Midjourney, Descript, Notion AI, and more) — that automates your delivery so you can handle more clients without more hours. Plus the cold DM outreach script and discovery call playbook to bring clients in consistently.

The guide also includes a 90-day scaling roadmap that takes the model from $1K to $3K to $5K/month without adding headcount.

$27. 21 pages. Every script included.

posts.linkedin:
Here's how a marketing professional used the A.I.M.™ Framework to hit $1,200/month in 6 weeks.

Starting point: Uses ChatGPT daily. Never monetized it. No clear offer. No audience.

Step A (Audience): Used the guide's Audience Selection Matrix to score 5 niches. Landed on: real estate agents who struggle to write consistent listing descriptions and social content.

Step I (Income Offer): Applied the O.P.S. Formula. Outcome: 8 listing descriptions + 20 social captions per month. Process: AI-assisted with human QA. Scale: deliverable in 3 days. Price: $350/month retainer.

Step M (Machine): Built the AI pipeline in ChatGPT with custom prompts. Used the cold DM script from the guide on LinkedIn.

Week 2: First response. Week 3: Discovery call using the playbook from the guide. Week 4: First client — $350/month retainer.

Week 6: 4 clients. $1,400/month recurring.

Total time invested to get to $1,400/month: about 25 hours over 6 weeks.

posts._note: Handle the top doubts: price, time, skill level, whether it will work for them.
posts.linkedin:
Let me clear up the hesitations.

"$1K/month sounds low. Is this worth my time?"
$1K/month is the floor, not the ceiling. The guide includes a 90-day roadmap that scales the same model to $3K–$5K/month using the same clients and system — just more of it.

"I don't know which niche to pick."
The guide includes the Audience Selection Matrix — a scoring tool that evaluates niches on 5 dimensions including market size, willingness to pay, and AI applicability. You'll know your niche by page 8.

"I don't know if AI can actually deliver quality for clients."
The guide focuses specifically on AI-assisted delivery — where AI handles the repeatable work and you handle quality control. Clients get faster delivery. You get scale.

"Cold DMs feel gross."
The guide's cold DM script is built on the principle of specific value, not generic pitching. It leads with a direct insight about the prospect's business — not a promotional message. The response rate is meaningful because it doesn't feel like spam.

"What if I can't find clients?"
The guide includes a daily outreach cadence, a follow-up sequence, and a discovery call playbook. It's not a strategy document — it's a contact sport.

$27.

👉 https://publixion.com/guides/1k-month-ai-side-hustle

#AISideHustle #Objections #AI #Publixion
